list.name: tenant_id
list.label: Tenant
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id FROM docintel_analytics.query_events ORDER BY tenant_id

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() FROM docintel_analytics.query_events WHERE ($__timeFilter(created_at)) AND (tenant_id = '${tenant_id}' OR '${tenant_id}' = '' OR '${tenant_id}' = 'All')
SELECT round(avg(latency_ms), 1) FROM docintel_analytics.query_events WHERE ($__timeFilter(created_at)) AND (tenant_id = '${tenant_id}' OR '${tenant_id}' = '' OR '${tenant_id}' = 'All')

SELECT round(countIf(cache_hit = true) / count() * 100, 1) FROM docintel_analytics.query_events WHERE ($__timeFilter(created_at)) AND (tenant_id = '${tenant_id}' OR '${tenant_id}' = '' OR '${tenant_id}' = 'All')
SELECT count() FROM docintel_analytics.feedback_events WHERE ($__timeFilter(created_at)) AND (tenant_id = '${tenant_id}' OR '${tenant_id}' = '' OR '${tenant_id}' = 'All')

SELECT round(countIf(liked = true) / count() * 100, 1) FROM docintel_analytics.feedback_events WHERE ($__timeFilter(created_at)) AND (tenant_id = '${tenant_id}' OR '${tenant_id}' = '' OR '${tenant_id}' = 'All')

SELECT toStartOfHour(created_at) AS time, count() AS queries FROM docintel_analytics.query_events WHERE ($__timeFilter(created_at)) AND (tenant_id = '${tenant_id}' OR '${tenant_id}' = '' OR '${tenant_id}' = 'All') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfHour(created_at) AS time, quantile(0.50)(latency_ms) AS p50, quantile(0.95)(latency_ms) AS p95, quantile(0.99)(latency_ms) AS p99 FROM docintel_analytics.query_events WHERE ($__timeFilter(created_at)) AND (tenant_id = '${tenant_id}' OR '${tenant_id}' = '' OR '${tenant_id}' = 'All') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT model_used, count() AS queries FROM docintel_analytics.query_events WHERE ($__timeFilter(created_at)) AND (tenant_id = '${tenant_id}' OR '${tenant_id}' = '' OR '${tenant_id}' = 'All') GROUP BY model_used ORDER BY queries DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Feedback — Likes vs Dislikes per Day

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfDay(created_at) AS time, countIf(liked = true) AS likes, countIf(liked = false) AS dislikes FROM docintel_analytics.feedback_events WHERE ($__timeFilter(created_at)) AND (tenant_id = '${tenant_id}' OR '${tenant_id}' = '' OR '${tenant_id}' = 'All') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT tenant_id, count() AS queries, round(avg(latency_ms), 1) AS avg_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(latency_ms), 1) AS p95_ms, round(countIf(cache_hit = true) / count() * 100, 1) AS cache_hit_pct FROM docintel_analytics.query_events WHERE ($__timeFilter(created_at)) GROUP BY tenant_id ORDER BY queries DESC
